title: acrostichum bifurcatum
intro: Acrostichum bifurcatum, also known as the fan fern or mangrove fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acrostichum bifurcatum include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used as a topical cream or ointment to treat various health conditions.
